principal_findings.correction: Evidence units now use a 450-character zero-overlap build, remove dominated contiguous units, atomize multirow table fragments, and reject units over 600 characters.
The page-95 language-file item was removed; no gold may depend on the absent USB-removal page.
The semantically overlapping language-file item was removed.
All design and execution cardinalities now state three items and three planner calls.
A clean v2 visual authorship contract binds the example citation to the first allowed focus page without mutating historical frozen cohorts.
planner_payload now rejects non-whitelisted question and source identity fields and bounds identity values.
S207 can authorize only a separately frozen target preregistration; it no longer claims stable target gains from a one-shot shadow.
Every rendered page now carries a receipt bound to its pixel hash plus visible anchors; aggregate inspection is derived from four page receipts.

independent_findings.correction: The residual four-versus-three count was removed.
The EN 2X-A installation manual that mirrors official Spanish gold content was removed from the cohort.

The mirror-contaminated item and cross-item LCD leakage were removed. The remaining exact MCP predicates are distinct from its existing HyQs, while every same-source question is still disclosed and semantic duplication remains a frontier publication veto.
A NO-GO is explicitly scoped to the exact terra-low execution; there is no retry or tuning loop in S207.
Dominated and multirow units were removed or atomized so precision no longer rewards an arbitrary whole-page granularity choice.
The upstream compiler uses an empty diagnostic base; foreign-language source text is selection evidence and is never represented as customer-facing answer prose.

reason_no_second_review: All material findings were independently reproduced and fixed once. Repeating design convergence would add cost and delay the measured upstream gate; execution remains fail-closed with no retries.
